creator: sreeharisreedev1@gmail.com
text: I've installed 12.2-BETA2 on another USB and I've noticed that while connected to wifi my speeds are barely 2 Mbit/s download and 0.21 Mbit/s upload using https://github.com/sivel/speedtest-cli, but the same tool reports 88.24 Mbit/s and 55.14 Mbit/s on the same machine running void linux, so it isn't just my internet speed. I hope I'm not coming off as complaining too much, I'd just like to help polish this stuff out through testing. I imagine certain logs/files may be helpful, but I just don't know what those would be.
